title: mosla exfoliata
intro: Mosla exfoliata, also known as Chinese chervil or Chinese peppercress, is a perennial plant native to China, belonging to the Apiaceae family. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The plant's leaves and stems have been used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Mosla exfoliata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for medicinal purposes, as well as being used in traditional cooking and as a garnish.
